task: Evaluate whether to build a new Thenvoi CrewAI adapter around CrewAI Flows for deterministic routing/delegation/join/synthesis.
final_recommendation: Build an experimental CrewAIFlowAdapter, but keep the existing CrewAIAdapter as the stable default. Scope v1 so CrewAI Flow runs as the local execution plan for one inbound Thenvoi message. Persist orchestration state in Thenvoi task events. Later peer replies should re-enter via normal on_message handling and reconstruct pending state from task events.

implementation_plan_seed.flow_scope: one inbound message / one local execution turn
non_goals_v1: paused Flow execution across external events
metadata attached directly to chat messages
tests: direct route sends one final response
multi-delegation join synthesizes once policy is satisfied
duplicate inbound retry does not duplicate delegation or final synthesis
restart reconstructs pending state from task events
later peer reply resumes through normal on_message
unsupported long wait behavior is explicit
